```bash
for line in wt_out.splitlines():
    if line.startswith('worktree '):
        worktrees.append(line[len('worktree '):])
for wt in worktrees:
    out=subprocess.check_output(['git','-C',wt,'status','--porcelain'], text=True)
    counts={'modified':0,'added':0,'deleted':0,'renamed':0,'copied':0,'unmerged':0,'untracked':0,'other':0}
    for line in out.splitlines():
        if line.startswith('??'):
            counts['untracked']+=1
            continue
        x,y=line[0],line[1]
        for ch in (x,y):
            if ch=='M': counts['modified']+=1
            elif ch=='A': counts['added']+=1
            elif ch=='D': counts['deleted']+=1
            elif ch=='R': counts['renamed']+=1
            elif ch=='C': counts['copied']+=1
            elif ch=='U': counts['unmerged']+=1
            elif ch not in ' ?': counts['other']+=1
    print(json.dumps({'worktree':wt,'counts':counts}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY
```

```bash
import subprocess
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell_command**</summary>
```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, collections
wt='/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f-other-tasks'
out=subprocess.check_output(['git','-C',wt,'status','--porcelain=v1','-z'], text=False)
entries=out.split(b'\x00')
# porcelain -z: each record like XY path or rename with second path; we only need current path bucket
buckets=collections.Counter()
examples={}
i=0
while i < len(entries)-1:
    rec=entries[i]
    if not rec:
        i+=1
        continue
    status=rec[:2].decode('utf-8', 'replace')
    path=rec[3:].decode('utf-8', 'replace')
    if status[0] in ('R','C') or status[1] in ('R','C'):
        i+=1
        # consume destination entry if present
    top=path.split('/',1)[0]
    buckets[top]+=1
    examples.setdefault(top,[])
    if len(examples[top])<5:
        examples[top].append((status, path))
    i+=1
for top,count in buckets.most_common():
    print(f'[{top}] {count}')
    for status,path in examples[top]:
        print(f'  {status} {path}')
PY
```

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, collections
wt='/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f-other-tasks'
out=subprocess.check_output(['git','-C',wt,'status','--porcelain=v1','-z'], text=False)
entries=out.split(b'\x00')
counts=collections.Counter()
staged=0
unstaged=0
untracked=0
paths=0
for rec in entries:
    if not rec:
        continue
    status=rec[:2].decode('utf-8','replace')
    paths+=1
    x,y=status[0],status[1]
    if status=='??':
        untracked+=1
        counts['untracked']+=1
        continue
    if x!=' ':
        staged+=1
    if y!=' ':
        unstaged+=1
    if 'D' in status:
        counts['deleted_paths']+=1
    elif 'A' in status:
        counts['added_paths']+=1
    elif 'R' in status:
        counts['renamed_paths']+=1
    elif 'C' in status:
        counts['copied_paths']+=1
    elif 'M' in status:
        counts['modified_paths']+=1
    else:
        counts['other_paths']+=1
print(f'paths={paths}')
print(f'staged_paths={staged}')
print(f'unstaged_paths={unstaged}')
for k in sorted(counts):
    print(f'{k}={counts[k]}')
PY
```

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, collections
root='/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f'
branches=subprocess.check_output(['git','for-each-ref','refs/heads','--format=%(refname:short)'], cwd=root, text=True).splitlines()
non=[b for b in branches if not b.startswith('archive/')]
counter=collections.Counter()
for b in non:
    if b.startswith('codex/'):
        counter['codex/*']+=1
    elif b.startswith('task-') or b.startswith('task/'):
        counter['task*']+=1
    elif b.startswith('feature/'):
        counter['feature/*']+=1
    else:
        counter['other']+=1
print(counter)
PY
```

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess
root='/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f'
local=set(subprocess.check_output(['git','for-each-ref','refs/heads','--format=%(refname:short)'], cwd=root, text=True).splitlines())
remote_raw=subprocess.check_output(['git','ls-remote','--heads','origin'], cwd=root, text=True).splitlines()
remote=[]
for line in remote_raw:
    sha, ref = line.split('\t',1)
    name = ref.removeprefix('refs/heads/')
    remote.append((name, sha[:7]))
remote_names=set(name for name,_ in remote)
print('REMOTE_COUNT', len(remote))
print('REMOTE_ONLY')
for name,sha in sorted((n,s) for n,s in remote if n not in local):
    print(f'{name}|{sha}')
print('LOCAL_ONLY')
for name in sorted(local-remote_names):
    print(name)
PY
```
